source_jobs.title: AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
AppZen is the leader in autonomous spend-to-pay software. Its patented artificial intelligence accurately and efficiently processes information from thousands of data sources so that organizations can better understand enterprise spend at scale to make smarter business decisions. It seamlessly integrates with existing accounts payable, expense, and card workflows to read, understand, and make real-time decisions based on your unique spend profile, leading to faster processing times and fewer instances of fraud or wasteful spend. Global enterprises, including one-third of the Fortune 500, use AppZen’s invoice, expense, and card transaction solutions to replace manual finance processes and accelerate the speed and agility of their businesses.
 
At AppZen, we value candidates who are actively using AI tools to enhance productivity, automate repetitive tasks, and solve problems more efficiently. Across all roles, we are looking for team members who leverage AI in meaningful ways to drive impact in their work.
 
To learn more, visit us at www.appzen.com.


We are looking for an AI Engineer to help build and scale our next-generation AI platform, with a strong focus on agentic systems. In this role, you’ll design and develop intelligent agents powered by LLMs—leveraging tool calling, orchestration frameworks, and advanced context management to enable reasoning, planning, and autonomous decision-making across complex workflows. You’ll work hands-on with modern agentic stacks (e.g., LangGraph, Autogen), asynchronous and streaming architectures, and production-grade observability to bring scalable, real-world AI systems to life. If you’re passionate about pushing the boundaries of agentic AI and building systems that operate reliably in production, AppZen offers a high-impact environment to do just that.

AppZen is looking for a Commercial Manager to lead and grow our mid-market sales team. This is a player/coach role — you'll carry a quota and close deals while managing and developing a team of commercial account executives. You'll report directly to sales leadership and play a critical part in scaling AppZen's commercial motion.

AppZen is seeking a motivated, customer-oriented attorney to join our legal team as Corporate Counsel, Commercial. You will be part of a fast-moving, collaborative team that touches all go-to-market aspects of AppZen. This role works closely with sales, marketing, operations, and finance to support the drafting, negotiation, and management of commercial contracts, primarily customer, reseller, vendor, and nondisclosure agreements in accordance with company policies and applicable law.
This is a great opportunity for an attorney looking to grow their in-house career in a high-growth SaaS environment. Strong candidates are solutions-oriented, eager to learn, and have some direct experience with software or cloud agreements.

To learn more, visit us at www.appzen.com.


We are looking for a highly motivated and strategic Enterprise Account Executive (EAE) with experience selling into finance teams, particularly in the AP Automation or Spend Management space. This is a high-impact role responsible for acquiring new customers and expanding relationships within existing Fortune 1000 accounts. Success will be achieved through solid territory and strategic account planning, prospecting to identify new and additional opportunities, and meeting and ideally exceeding sales quota. 
 
You’ll own the full sales cycle—from pipeline creation through contract signature—working with finance executives, procurement leaders, and strategic partners to drive adoption of AppZen’s solutions.

We are looking for a seasoned Enterprise Account Executive (m/w/d) to drive new business and expand AppZen’s presence across large enterprise organizations in Germany and the broader DACH region.
This role focuses on landing new enterprise customers and building long-term strategic relationships with senior finance leaders. You will navigate complex, multi-stakeholder sales cycles and engage with executives at the highest levels within global organizations.
You will own the full sales cycle from strategic prospecting through contract negotiation and closing, while working closely with finance, procurement, and executive stakeholders.

The Enterprise Account Executive (EAE) is responsible for driving revenue growth by building and nurturing new and existing client relationships, facilitating customer success, and developing strategic, value-based business relationships. The role requires a strong focus on developing new business, as well as expansion of existing accounts. Success will be achieved through solid territory and strategic account planning, prospecting to identify new and additional opportunities, qualifying and developing opportunities within Fortune 1000 accounts, understanding the client’s business needs, building and maintaining a pipeline of 3-4x quota, and meeting and ideally exceeding sales quota.

We are looking for a seasoned Enterprise Account Executive with a strong track record of landing and expanding large Fortune 1000 accounts through complex, consultative sales cycles. This role is focused on driving new enterprise business, opening doors at the highest levels of finance organizations, and building long-term strategic relationships within some of the world’s largest companies.
 
You will manage a large enterprise territory that includes multiple divisions and buying centers within Fortune 1000 organizations. Success requires deep account planning, executive-level engagement, and the ability to navigate long, multi-stakeholder sales cycles—while still maintaining momentum across a wide account base.
 
You will own the full sales process, from strategic prospecting to contract execution, working closely with finance, procurement, and executive leadership to drive adoption of AppZen’s AI-powered finance solutions.
 
Open locations include San Francisco Bay Area; Dallas, TX; Boston, MA.

We’re looking for a hands-on GTM Systems & Analytics Manager to own and scale our Salesforce ecosystem while supporting data-driven go-to-market execution. This role sits at the intersection of RevOps, Sales, and Finance—but with a strong emphasis on building, configuring, and optimizing Salesforce.
 
You will act as a Salesforce builder and systems owner, translating business needs into scalable technical solutions. From designing workflows and automations to managing sandbox testing and production releases, you’ll play a critical role in enabling our GTM teams to operate efficiently and at scale.
 
This is an ideal role for someone who enjoys both building systems and driving insights—but leans heavily toward hands-on Salesforce administration and configuration.

We’re looking for an experienced Sales Development Representative (SDR) to generate sales opportunities and build sales pipeline with prospective clients.
 
The ideal candidate will possess confident communication skills when engaging with potential customers, building relationships and identifying new sales leads. To be successful in this role, the candidate should have previous experience generating leads from inbound and outbound Sales and Marketing activities, and collaborating with account executives in order to meet and exceed pipeline development and lead generation goals. The candidate should also have experience building pipeline utilizing call scripts, generating leads by phone and leveraging social media to target prospects and manage interaction.

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative - London
source_jobs.description:
AppZen is the leader in autonomous spend-to-pay software. Its patented artificial intelligence accurately and efficiently processes information from thousands of data sources so that organizations can better understand enterprise spend at scale to make smarter business decisions. It seamlessly integrates with existing accounts payable, expense, and card workflows to read, understand, and make real-time decisions based on your unique spend profile, leading to faster processing times and fewer instances of fraud or wasteful spend. At AppZen, we value candidates who are actively using AI tools to enhance productivity, automate repetitive tasks, and solve problems more efficiently. Across all roles, we are looking for team members who leverage AI in meaningful ways to drive impact in their work.
 
To learn more, visit us at www.appzen.com.


As a Sales Development Representative at AppZen, you will be responsible for identifying, researching, and engaging with businesses and typically their finance decision-makers.

Through intelligent identification and discovery, you will need to understand prospect business challenges and identify alignment in how AppZen's AI solutions can be of benefit. You will be responsible for booking meetings, which will be jointly held with Account Executives to dive deeper into AppZen, enabling further qualification to build pipeline. 

We are looking for someone hungry to succeed, with a strong work ethic, resilience and boundless energy. You’ll be highly coachable and able to apply learnings from daily coaching in your role, developing new skills and improving every day as a sales professional.

This role will involve cold calling, mass and personalised emails, voice notes, videos, and LinkedIn outreach. Frequent rejection is inevitable, and we need someone who never lets a no affect them negatively, and will always dust themselves off and keep going. 

You’ll be someone who sees everything as a learning opportunity. Naturally, you’ll be a highly motivated self-starter, a brilliant communicator and highly organised in the role.

financial workflows. Trusted by global enterprises, including one-third of the Fortune 500, AppZen
delivers accelerated processing times, reduced fraud, and optimized financial operations. Visit us at
www.appzen.com.

AppZen is expanding into Germany and is looking for an energetic and motivated Senior Solutions Consultant with experience presenting Accounts Payable, Procure-to-Pay, or financial automation solutions to enterprise customers.
In this role, you will partner closely with Sales Account Executives to drive revenue by taking technical ownership of opportunities throughout the full sales cycle. You will support Account Executives from deal qualification and discovery through technical validation, proof points, and successful deal closure.

The Principal Solutions Consultant combines strong business acumen and technical expertise, with the ability to clearly articulate value to audiences ranging from IT and Finance teams to senior leadership and C-level executives. You will act as a trusted advisor to both prospects and internal stakeholders, addressing technical objections and guiding customers toward successful outcomes.
